from sentence_transformers import SentenceTransformer
from PIL import Image
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np
%matplotlib inline
model = SentenceTransformer("clip-ViT-B-32")

In [21]:
from sentence_transformers import util

def display_image_and_compare(image_path, text_description):
    # 1. Load and display the query image
    img = Image.open(image_path)
    plt.figure(figsize=(5, 5))
    plt.imshow(img)
    plt.axis('off')
    plt.title("Image for similarity comparison")
    plt.show()
    
    # 2. Encode the image and the list of text descriptions
    img_emb = model.encode(img, convert_to_tensor=True)
    text_emb = model.encode(text_description, convert_to_tensor=True)
    
    # 3. Compute cosine similarity scores between the image and texts
    cos_scores = util.cos_sim(img_emb, text_emb)[0]
    
    # 4. Find the best match
    best_match_idx = cos_scores.argmax().item()
    best_text = text_description[best_match_idx]
    best_score = cos_scores[best_match_idx].item()
    
    # 5. Print the final result
    print(f"Best match for the image is: '{best_text}' with score {best_score:.6f}")

text_description = ["Two dogs in the snow ",
                    "A cat on a table ",
                    "A picture of london at night",
                    "Taj mahal view",
                    "A dog sleeping on a coach",

In [36]:
import os
from sentence_transformers import util
from PIL import Image
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

# 1. Your original list of text descriptions from cell [1]
text_description = [
    "Two dogs in the snow ",
    "A cat on a table ",
    "A picture of london at night",
    "Taj mahal view",
    "A dog sleeping on a coach",
    "Two cvats fighting in the garden",
    "India's national parrot peacock",
    "A beautiful pink rose",
    "A beautiful green hills valley"
]

# 2. Define the matching function
def display_image_and_compare(image_path, text_description):
    # Verify file existence in local folder
    if not os.path.exists(image_path):
        raise FileNotFoundError(
            f"Could not find '{image_path}' in your folder: {os.getcwd()}\n"
            f"Please verify you have moved your image here."
        )
        
    # Load and display local image
    img = Image.open(image_path)
    plt.figure(figsize=(5, 5))
    plt.imshow(img)
    plt.axis('off')
    plt.title("Image for sismolarity comparsion")
    plt.show()
    
    # Process similarity 
    img_emb = model.encode(img, convert_to_tensor=True)
    text_emb = model.encode(text_description, convert_to_tensor=True)
    
    cos_scores = util.cos_sim(img_emb, text_emb)
    best_match_idx = cos_scores.argmax().item()
    best_text = text_description[best_match_idx]
    best_score = cos_scores[best_match_idx].item()
    
    print(f"Best match for the image is: {best_text} with score {best_score:.6f}")
